message:
chore: ignore mobile testing artifacts in gitignore

Add entries to .gitignore for Playwright mobile testing outputs.

apps/web/mobile-screenshots/:
- Directory where viewport test screenshots are saved
- Generated by test-mobile.ts during automated testing
- Screenshots are for local review only, not version controlled

Note: test-mobile.ts was previously committed as part of the
testing infrastructure. The gitignore entry won't affect the
already-tracked file but prevents accidental re-addition if
removed and recreated.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -83,6 +83,8 @@ ehthumbs.db
 tests/vm/.vagrant/
 tests/vm/*.box
 tests/vm/ubuntu-*
+apps/web/mobile-screenshots/
+apps/web/test-mobile.ts
 
 # ----- Installer test outputs -----
 *.log
